backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Kala Ghoda app that manages events, newsletter subscribers, and user profiles with role-based access control, including seed data initialization and CRUD operations for events.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (luxury design system, home page sections, events page, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of two frontend source files: App.tsx (routing setup) and AdminEventFormPage.tsx (add/edit event form).
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Kala Ghoda React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application file that defines all TanStack Router routes (home, events, event detail, admin login/dashboard/add/edit), wraps admin routes with an AdminRoute guard, and renders the root layout with Navbar and WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin permissions, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the admin login page while showing a loading spinner during verification.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteMod: Modal dialog component using shadcn AlertDialog that prompts the user to confirm deletion of an event by name, with Cancel and Delete actions and a loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/CountdownTimer.t: Countdown timer component that takes a nanosecond timestamp and displays a live days/hours/minutes/seconds countdown, showing 'Event Has Started' once the target time is reached.
frontend/src/components/EventCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a single event, displaying its poster image, status badge, date/time, ticket price, and a link to the event detail page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component with brand logo, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp), quick navigation links, and contact information.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: Full-screen image lightbox overlay with keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape) and prev/next buttons for browsing a list of images.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, nav links, conditional admin link, and Internet Identity login/logout button, including a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSectio: Email newsletter subscription section with form validation, submission via a React Query mutation, and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallerySlid: Displays a responsive grid of gallery images that open in a Lightbox component when clicked, with prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button that links to a pre-filled WhatsApp message for table booking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control if a token is present, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state management using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including CRUD operations for events, newsletter subscription, and subscriber listing.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, enabling scroll-triggered reveal animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Cinzel and Inter fonts, defines CSS custom properties for a dark gold-themed design system, and declares utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying event and subscriber stats with controls to create, edit, delete, and toggle event status, plus logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/AdminEventFormPage.ts: Admin form page for creating or editing events, handling image uploads (converted to base64), form validation, and submission via create/update mutations.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Renders the admin login page using Internet Identity authentication, redirecting to /admin if the caller is verified as an admin, or showing an error if not authorized.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single event fetched by ID, including banner image, date/time, countdown timer, photo gallery, and a WhatsApp booking link.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Lists all events split into upcoming and past sections using a responsive grid of EventCard components, with loading skeletons and scroll-reveal animation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a fullscreen hero video section, about section, upcoming events grid, photo gallery, newsletter signup, and footer.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with black/gold luxury colors, Cinzel fonts, custom shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the Kala Ghoda nightclub website's architecture (Next.js, Express, MongoDB), implemented features, required images, and overall design/functionality requirements.
